$comment: Pinned set of compiler-conformance fixtures (in conformance/tests/) that
are intentionally NOT mirrored under conformance/sdk-output/tests/.
The SDK-output suite verifies that all 7 SDKs produce byte-identical
deploy-time *locking scripts* given the same compiled artifact + ctor
args. Most contracts that the compiler conformance suite covers also
make sense to fingerprint at the SDK layer; a few do not (e.g. tests
that exercise method-call-time behaviour but are otherwise structurally
redundant with an existing SDK-output fixture).
Rules for editing this file:
1. Adding an entry requires a short rationale on the line — no silent
omissions. The audit (sdk-runner.ts --audit) fails CI if any
compiler-conformance fixture is missing from sdk-output/tests/ AND
not listed here.
2. Removing an entry means the fixture must gain a matching
conformance/sdk-output/tests/<name>/{input.json,expected-locking.hex}
in the same commit.
3. An entry that names a fixture which has BOTH been backfilled into
sdk-output/ AND removed from compiler conformance is stale; the
audit fails on stale entries.
See conformance/README.md § "SDK output coverage" for the rendered
table that mirrors this file.

approvedOmissions.add-data-output: Method-time data-output behaviour; deploy locking script is identical to the parent stateless contract already covered by basic-p2pkh.
approvedOmissions.add-raw-output: Method-time raw-output behaviour; deploy locking script identical to a stateless wrapper. Method-call output mismatch is caught by the dedicated ANF parity fixture conformance/anf-interpreter/inputs/add-raw-output-publish.json (lenient + strict goldens), which fans out across all 7 SDK driver outputs and asserts byte-equal {state, dataOutputs, rawOutputs} envelopes.
approvedOmissions.conditional-data-output-stateful: Method-time conditional output; deploy locking script is the stateful continuation already covered by stateful / stateful-counter.
approvedOmissions.private-helper-outputs: Inlining of private helpers does not affect deploy locking script when the helper is fully inlined; method-call output is covered by ANF parity.
approvedOmissions.ec-unit: Compiler unit fixture for EC primitive opcode emission; its contract shape is structurally redundant with ec-demo / ec-primitives which are SDK-output covered.
approvedOmissions.go-dsl-bytestring-literal: Go-DSL surface-syntax parser test (Int/Uint/ByteString aliasing); same lowered IR as basic-p2pkh, so the deploy locking script is identical.
approvedOmissions.if-without-else-multi-temp: Stack-lowering edge case for if-without-else with multiple temporaries; the resulting locking script is structurally captured by if-else / if-without-else (SDK-output covered).
approvedOmissions.bitwise-ops: Compiler-level bitwise codegen unit; deploy locking script behaviour is captured by arithmetic / boolean-logic / shift-ops parity.
approvedOmissions.state-ripemd160: Stateful RIPEMD-160 unit test; structurally redundant with stateful-bytestring + stateful-counter for the deploy locking script.
approvedOmissions.multisig: Stateless 2-of-3 multisig; checkMultiSig + array_literal are method-time codegen (compiler-conformance covered), and multi-constructor-slot splicing across the 7 SDKs is already exercised by p256-wallet / auction. Adds no new SDK deploy-locking-script behaviour.
approvedOmissions.asm-raw-script: Raw-asm intrinsic unit (UnsafeSmartContract); stateless deploy with no constructor slots — the locking script is the compiled hex already gated by compiler conformance, structurally redundant at the SDK layer.
approvedOmissions.branched-readonly-len: Affine-checker regression fixture (Len-driven if/else with state mutation on both arms); deploy locking script is the stateful continuation already covered by stateful / stateful-counter, and the method-time branch behaviour is covered by ANF parity.
approvedOmissions.intent-current-block-height: Intent-covenant intrinsic (currentBlockHeight, sugar for extractLocktime); deploy locking script is the stateful continuation covered by stateful, and method-time witness behaviour is covered by conformance/anf-interpreter/inputs/intent-current-block-height.json (lenient + strict goldens, all 7 SDK drivers).
approvedOmissions.intent-output-p2pkh: Intent-covenant intrinsic (requireOutputP2PKH); stateful deploy covered by stateful; method-time witness behaviour covered by conformance/anf-interpreter/inputs/intent-output-p2pkh.json across all 7 SDK drivers.
approvedOmissions.intent-prev-output-script: Intent-covenant intrinsic (extractPrevOutputScript); stateful deploy covered by stateful; method-time witness behaviour covered by conformance/anf-interpreter/inputs/intent-prev-output-script.json across all 7 SDK drivers.
approvedOmissions.post-quantum-slhdsa-128f: SLH-DSA parameter-set variant of post-quantum-slhdsa (SDK-output covered); identical SDK deploy-splice path, differs only in compile-time SLH-DSA parameter constants.
approvedOmissions.post-quantum-slhdsa-192f: SLH-DSA parameter-set variant of post-quantum-slhdsa (SDK-output covered); identical SDK deploy-splice path, differs only in compile-time SLH-DSA parameter constants.
approvedOmissions.post-quantum-slhdsa-192s: SLH-DSA parameter-set variant of post-quantum-slhdsa (SDK-output covered); identical SDK deploy-splice path, differs only in compile-time SLH-DSA parameter constants.
approvedOmissions.post-quantum-slhdsa-256f: SLH-DSA parameter-set variant of post-quantum-slhdsa (SDK-output covered); identical SDK deploy-splice path, differs only in compile-time SLH-DSA parameter constants.
approvedOmissions.post-quantum-slhdsa-256s: SLH-DSA parameter-set variant of post-quantum-slhdsa (SDK-output covered); identical SDK deploy-splice path, differs only in compile-time SLH-DSA parameter constants.
